state_manifold.embedding_function: BFS distance from reference state under generator set
constraints: Reference state must lie in domain
Energy(s) = minimal generator path length from reference_state to s

generators.name: love_soothe
generators.invariant_effect: decreases threat and increases regulation simultaneously

generators.name: love_reframe
generators.invariant_effect: reduces threat level by 1 without changing regulation

generators.name: nu
generators.transition_rule: CAPS_BE: (b,e) → (b/2,e/2) if b and e both even
generators.invariant_effect: halves both coordinates when both are even

invariants.name: 1_lipschitz
invariants.definition: Energy(t) ≤ Energy(s) + 1 for every generator edge s→t

invariants.name: tight_predecessor
invariants.definition: Every reachable state except reference has a predecessor p with Energy(p) = Energy(s) - 1

invariants.name: family_power_stats
invariants.definition: Aggregate ΔE by family_tag over all reachable tagged-generator edges

invariants.name: family_interaction
invariants.definition: 2-step ΔE(s→u) keyed by ordered (from_family, to_family) pair (interaction_horizon=2)

invariants.name: episode_consistency
invariants.definition: Observed episodes must respect per-generator ΔE bounds and (tagged) 2-step family interaction ΔE₂ bounds from expected_summary

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_version mismatch or JSON schema violation
unknown domain, reference_state out of domain, or interaction_horizon != 2
BFS recomputed energy or return_energy differs from cert
expect_can_return does not match computed reverse BFS result
recomputed SCC count or max_scc_size differs from expected_summary
per-generator, family, or interaction stats differ from expected_summary

reachability.component_analysis: Energy = BFS shortest-path distance from reference_state; return_energy = reverse BFS. Reachable set and all distances fully determined by (domain, N, reference_state, generator_set). SCC analysis via Kosaraju iterative algorithm.

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: BFS distance is unique shortest-path length (FIFO queue, deterministic on sorted node list). SCC via Kosaraju iterative. Power stats sorted by generator name. All recomputed values are deterministic given (domain, N, reference_state, generator_set).
